description: The prediction indicates a potential risk of cardiovascular disease.
This condition may involve narrowing or blockage of blood vessels, increasing the risk of heart attack or stroke.
Early detection and proper management can significantly reduce complications.
treatment: Lifestyle modification including diet and exercise
Pharmacological treatment as prescribed by a physician
Regular monitoring of blood pressure and cholesterol
In severe cases, surgical interventions like angioplasty or bypass surgery
diet: Increase intake of fruits, vegetables, and whole grains
Include omega-3 rich foods like fish and nuts
workout: Avoid heavy or high-intensity workouts without medical advice
precautions: Regular health checkups with a cardiologist

description: No significant risk of heart disease is detected based on the provided parameters.
However, maintaining a healthy lifestyle is essential to prevent future complications.
diet: Maintain a balanced diet rich in nutrients
Include fruits, vegetables, and whole grains
Limit saturated fats and sugar intake
workout: Regular physical activity (at least 30 minutes daily)
Walking, jogging, or light cardio exercises
precautions: Maintain normal blood pressure and cholesterol levels
Avoid smoking and excessive alcohol consumption
